name: The Utopia Studio Default
summary: The default locked theme for The Utopia Studio. It maps the Ceramic semantic contract to the studio's brand primitives while keeping those decisions out of reusable core components.

wordmark.usage: May identify The Utopia Studio branded products, documents, and template surfaces. Core components must not depend on this asset.

typography.arabicDisplayRule: Do not translate Latin all-caps styling into Arabic uppercase. Use Arabic display scale, weight, rhythm, and IBM Plex Sans Arabic instead.

geometry.elevation: hairline borders and background shifts; no brand-surface drop shadows

semanticMappings.--primary: Accessible Brick Red action tone (#B8472C); preserve #CC5536 as the brand primitive
semanticMappings.--overlay: Special Black at modal dim opacity

allow: solid Special Black, Light Grey, Brick Red, and White surfaces

iconPolicy.description: Icons are brand marks made from solid dots and rectangular bars. They are graphic breaks, not decoration.
allow: monochrome Special Black or current foreground
iconPolicy.coreNote: This restriction belongs to Utopia Default only. Other themes may declare different icon systems.

ar.summary: الثيم الافتراضي المقفل لـ The Utopia Studio. يربط عقد Ceramic الدلالي بقيم الاستوديو الأولية مع إبقاء قرارات العلامة خارج مكونات الجوهر القابلة لإعادة الاستخدام.

iconPolicy.system: نظام النقاط والأشرطة الخاص بـ Utopia
iconPolicy.description: الأيقونات علامات للهوية مبنية من نقاط صلبة وأشرطة مستطيلة. هي فواصل بصرية وليست زخرفة.
allow: لون أحادي Special Black أو لون المقدمة الحالي

aiRules: Read this theme policy after the core semantic contract.
Do not apply Utopia brand restrictions to other themes unless their manifests say so.
Do not hardcode Brick Red, Special Black, TWK Lausanne, or Utopia icon rules inside reusable core components.
When Arabic or lang="ar" content is present, use --font-arabic mapped to IBM Plex Sans Arabic and the Arabic line-height role.
Arabic display sizing follows the Latin display scale at approximately 95%, rather than making Arabic headings larger than Latin headings.
Do not apply Latin uppercase display styling to Arabic. Use Arabic display/body tokens and text-transform: none.
When this theme is active, do not use Lucide icons as brand-facing component icons.
Modal content uses --modal-surface and must stay solid in Utopia Default; only the overlay dims the page behind it.
Floating content such as select, menu, popover, and tooltip uses --popover-surface so alpha page surfaces do not make controls look translucent.
